Variable.doc:
Browser config table with keys: name (string), bundleID (string), processName (string).
Auto-detected from running applications if nil. Checks Dia first, then Google Chrome.
stripped_doc: Browser config table with keys: name (string), bundleID (string), processName (string).
Auto-detected from running applications if nil. Checks Dia first, then Google Chrome.
Variable.desc: Browser config table with keys: name (string), bundleID (string), processName (string).
Variable.name: browser

Variable.doc:
List of profile tables, each with keys: name (string), titlePattern (string or nil),
routeFile (string), icon (string), isDefault (boolean).
Auto-discovered from route files in `routesDir` if nil. Profile names are derived from
filenames (e.g., `work.txt` becomes "Work"). The default profile is detected automatically
by scanning browser window titles at start time.
stripped_doc: List of profile tables, each with keys: name (string), titlePattern (string or nil),
routeFile (string), icon (string), isDefault (boolean).
Auto-discovered from route files in `routesDir` if nil. Profile names are derived from
filenames (e.g., `work.txt` becomes "Work"). The default profile is detected automatically
by scanning browser window titles at start time.
Variable.desc: List of profile tables, each with keys: name (string), titlePattern (string or nil),
Variable.name: profiles

Variable.doc:
Directory containing route text files. Each `.txt` file defines a profile.
Default: `~/.hammerspoon/routes/`
stripped_doc: Directory containing route text files. Each `.txt` file defines a profile.
Default: `~/.hammerspoon/routes/`
Variable.desc: Directory containing route text files. Each `.txt` file defines a profile.
Variable.name: routesDir

Variable.doc: Seconds before a manually-moved URL can be auto-routed again. Default: 600 (10 minutes).
stripped_doc: Seconds before a manually-moved URL can be auto-routed again. Default: 600 (10 minutes).
Variable.desc: Seconds before a manually-moved URL can be auto-routed again. Default: 600 (10 minutes).
Variable.name: cooldownSeconds

Variable.doc: When true, log activity to `~/.hammerspoon/profile-router.log`. Default: true.
stripped_doc: When true, log activity to `~/.hammerspoon/profile-router.log`. Default: true.
Variable.desc: When true, log activity to `~/.hammerspoon/profile-router.log`. Default: true.
Variable.name: debug

items.doc:
Bind hotkeys for ProfileRouter actions.

Parameters:
 * mapping - A table with the key `cycleTab` mapped to a hotkey spec: `{modifiers, key}`.
   Example: `{cycleTab = {{"ctrl"}, "s"}}`

Returns:
 * The ProfileRouter object
stripped_doc: Bind hotkeys for ProfileRouter actions.
items.name: bindHotkeys
parameters: * mapping - A table with the key `cycleTab` mapped to a hotkey spec: `{modifiers, key}`.

items.doc:
Move the current tab to the next profile. With 2 profiles this toggles;
with 3+ it advances to the next and wraps around. Marks the URL on cooldown
so the auto-router won't move it back. Shows a notification with an Undo button.

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * None
stripped_doc: Move the current tab to the next profile. With 2 profiles this toggles;
with 3+ it advances to the next and wraps around. Marks the URL on cooldown
so the auto-router won't move it back. Shows a notification with an Undo button.
items.desc: Move the current tab to the next profile. With 2 profiles this toggles;
items.name: cycleTab

items.doc:
Initialize the Spoon. Called automatically by `hs.loadSpoon`.

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The ProfileRouter object
stripped_doc: Initialize the Spoon. Called automatically by `hs.loadSpoon`.
items.desc: Initialize the Spoon. Called automatically by `hs.loadSpoon`.
items.name: init

items.doc:
Start watching for tabs and routing them. Detects the browser, discovers profiles
from route files, starts the window title watcher, route file watcher, cooldown timer,
and external URL handler.

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The ProfileRouter object
stripped_doc: Start watching for tabs and routing them. Detects the browser, discovers profiles
from route files, starts the window title watcher, route file watcher, cooldown timer,
and external URL handler.
items.desc: Start watching for tabs and routing them. Detects the browser, discovers profiles
items.name: start

items.doc:
Stop all watchers, timers, and hotkeys. Unregisters the external URL handler.

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The ProfileRouter object
stripped_doc: Stop all watchers, timers, and hotkeys. Unregisters the external URL handler.
items.desc: Stop all watchers, timers, and hotkeys. Unregisters the external URL handler.

doc:
Route browser tabs between profiles automatically.
Supports Dia and Google Chrome with any number of profiles.
[Homepage](https://github.com/malpern/ProfileRouter)
name: ProfileRouter
